entities.context: Chairman, Senate Committee on Interior and Insular Affairs

entities.name: Committee on Interior and Insular Affairs

events.description: S. 716 introduced to authorize patent in fee to George Peters
S. 716 passed the Senate, authorizing sale of George Peters' land under existing regulations

relationships.subject: George Peters
relationships.context: Peters indicated desire to sell land to Redfield, another Crow Indian, in 1921

relationships.subject: James E. Murray
relationships.context: Murray introduced S. 716 to authorize patent in fee/sale of Peters' land

correspondence.recipient_title: Chairman, Senate Committee on Interior and Insular Affairs
correspondence.subject: Report on S. 716 authorizing patent in fee to George Peters
correspondence.action_requested: Recommendation to enact bill if amended to allow sale to a Crow Indian under existing regulations
correspondence.outcome: Report forwarded to Senator Murray on March 10; bill subsequently amended as suggested

correspondence.subject: Introduction of S. 716 to authorize patent in fee to George Peters
correspondence.outcome: Bill passed the Senate on April 11, 1949

legislative_actions.outcome: Bill passed the Senate on April 11, 1949
